items.title: Jennifer English Steps Away From Tides of Annihilation Role Due to Health Concerns

items.title: These Retiring LEGO Sets Are Sold Out at the LEGO Store, But You Can Still Snag Them At Amazon
Marvel's Wolverine Trailer Flooded With Comments as Physical Disc Backlash Against PlayStation Continues
items.summary: Insomniac Games attempted to drum up excitement when it published a new cinematic trailer for Marvel's Wolverine yesterday, but it didn't take long for it to flood with negative comments from fans who haven't forgiven Sony after it announced plans to cease production of physical discs for PlayStation games.

items.title: A24 Addresses Copyright Strikes on Backrooms Fan Art After Director Kane Parsons Promises to Investigate
items.summary: A24 has issued a statement clarifying the numerous takedown notices filed on behalf of its brand after Backrooms director Kane Parsons promised he’d investigate.

items.title: Why I Don't Recommend the Steam Deck Anymore
items.summary: Ever since the Steam Deck debuted in 2022, it's been one of my favorite devices. It was relatively affordable for a handheld gaming PC, but still powerful enough to play pretty much anything I would realistically play on the go. And while I still love the thing, the recent price increases make it almost impossible to recommend to anyone looking for a budget gaming handheld right now.
